nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: "You reek of the outside world, vermin! Slither back to whatever miserable hole you crawled out of. Get out of the Verge before I crush you myself!"

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: "Whoa, take it easy! Don't blow a dust cloud yelling like that, grandpa."

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: "Sorry, can't do that. I've got places to be."
